name: First Doctrine (Warpriest)
description: You're trained in light and medium armor, and you have expert proficiency in Fortitude saves. You gain the general feat, a reaction to reduce damage with a shield. If your deity's favored weapon is a simple weapon or an unarmed attack, you gain the cleric feat. At 13th level, if you gain the class feature, you also gain expert proficiency in light and medium armor.
